name: fx_hedging
description: An FX exposure-hedging treasury: a book of open foreign-currency positions marked to a deterministic spot market; open, close, and hedge to manage net exposure and realized PnL.

card.description: An FX exposure-hedging treasury: a book of open foreign-currency positions marked to a deterministic spot market; open, close, and hedge to manage net exposure and realized PnL.

rules: Quotes are USD per one unit of foreign currency; a position's USD value is notional * spot.
Each action advances time one tick; the spot of every pair re-marks deterministically before the action is applied.
'open' adds a long or short position at the current spot for the given pair (default EURUSD long, 1,000,000 notional).
'close' removes a position and books its mark-to-market PnL into cash and realized_pnl (defaulting to the oldest open lot).

'hedge' locks part of a lot's notional at the current spot via amount or ratio (default: fully hedge the oldest lot still carrying open risk); the hedged slice's PnL is frozen and net_exposure shrinks accordingly.
net_exposure is the signed, unhedged USD exposure across the book; a breach is flagged whenever its absolute value exceeds risk_limit.

emit.report: FX book: {num_positions} positions | gross ${gross_exposure} | net ${net_exposure} (hedge {hedge_ratio}) | uPnL ${unrealized_pnl} | rPnL ${realized_pnl} | equity ${total_equity} | breach={breach}
